case_title: KLOTZ, WERNER vs. SAN FRANCISCO ART COMMISSION GALLERY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLOTZ, WERNER AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ART COMMISSION GALLERY DOES 1 TO 10 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-04-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-18-1994

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ART COMMISSION GALLERY ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
